text.message: Why you taking those trades black? You are giving green the game lol
And when he gets it we’re done.
Black only needs a k I jt to win
Red is this your first time playing?
Take if off his tree Gj
Please don’t act like you aren’t close to winning
Blue literally is a dev from winning
And you took it off his most important hex
I wasn’t when he did that
Honestly it is like you want me to help you win black. I put it on a high prob hex that affected both
That 9 does nothing for green lol
